title: PwD - Landing on Portal Homepage and Dashboard - Functional Test Plan (33 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-106: PwD - Landing on Portal Homepage and Dashboard. Validates home page access, branding, navigation tabs, hero carousel slides and buttons, summary widgets (counters), featured devices section, success stories section, header/footer, dashboard elements after login, and responsive behavior.

testCases.title: Home page loads successfully
testCases.preconditions: User navigates to base URL.
expectedResults: Home page loads successfully.

testCases.title: Page has AT/AD portal branding (logo visible)
testCases.preconditions: User is on the home page.
expectedResults: AT/AD portal logo is visible in header.

testCases.title: Sign In/Register button is visible for unauthenticated users
testCases.preconditions: User is not logged in.
expectedResults: Sign In/Register button is visible.

testCases.title: Sign In/Register button is hidden after login
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in.
expectedResults: Sign In/Register button is hidden.

testCases.title: Home nav link is present and navigates to home page
testCases.preconditions: User is on the home page.
expectedResults: Home nav link is present and navigates to home page.

testCases.title: Catalog nav link is present and navigates to catalog page
testCases.preconditions: User is on the home page.
expectedResults: Catalog nav link navigates to catalog page.

expectedResults: Stories nav link navigates to stories page.
